publishedAbstract: * In this article we try to clarify if Red Hat OpenShift Container Storage *v4.X* is even affected by the Red Hat Ceph Storage RGW issue highlighted in the KCS `[RGW fails with 404 NoSuchKey ERROR and unable to download existing objects from the cluster](https://access.redhat.com/solutions/5592891)`
publishedTitle: Is OpenShift Container Storage affected by the RGW failure with 404 NoSuchKey ERROR?
